package rulefixtures

// scenario for sync_mutex_for_atomic_counter: `mu.Lock(); count++; mu.Unlock()` for simple integer counters
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule675NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario675Negative(records []Rule675NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
